ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefixes all transaction amounts
ast.target: 为所有交易金额添加前缀

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path in the Vault to your Ledger file. NOTE: If you use Obsidian Sync, you must enable "Sync all other types".
ast.target: Vault 中指向你的 Ledger 文件的路径。注意：如果你使用 Obsidian Sync，必须启用 "Sync all other types"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The account prefix used for grouping asset accounts. If you use aliases in your Ledger file, this must be the **unaliased** account prefix. e.g. "Assets" instead of "a"
ast.target: 用于分组资产账户的账户前缀。如果你在 Ledger 文件中使用别名，这里必须是**未使用别名**的账户前缀。例如，用 "Assets" 而不是 "a"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The account prefix used for grouping expense accounts. If you use aliases in your Ledger file, this must be the **unaliased** account prefix. e.g. "Expenses" instead of "e"
ast.target: 用于分组支出账户的账户前缀。如果你在 Ledger 文件中使用别名，这里必须是**未使用别名**的账户前缀。例如，用 "Expenses" 而不是 "e"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The account prefix used for grouping income accounts. If you use aliases in your Ledger file, this must be the **unaliased** account prefix. e.g. "Income" instead of "i"
ast.target: 用于分组收入账户的账户前缀。如果你在 Ledger 文件中使用别名，这里必须是**未使用别名**的账户前缀。例如，用 "Income" 而不是 "i"

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The account prefix used for grouping liability accounts. If you use aliases in your Ledger file, this must be the **unaliased** account prefix. e.g. "Liabilities" instead of "l"
ast.target: 用于分组负债账户的账户前缀。如果你在 Ledger 文件中使用别名，这里必须是**未别名**的账户前缀。例如用“Liabilities”而不是“l”。
